gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
二維平面蛇身—戰國玉器的設計原則
The two-dimensional serpent body— on the design concepts of jade works from the Warring States Period
動態感是戰國玉器追求的藝術目標，創作原型則是蛇蜒蠕動的蛇。
二維波形為視覺可辨識出蛇的形體之最低標準，故戰國玉器多以二維平面的波形作為設計原則。有此瞭解後，即可明白本件作品何以呈現平面剪影形式，並採取蛇蜒波形設計身軀。此外，波形會產生上下起伏的韻律感，恰好正是創造動態錯覺的極佳形制，有此優勢，自然廣為創作者援引運用。
The primary aesthetic goal of jade works from the Warring States Period was to create a dynamic sensation of illusory motion, and thus they employed the winding, flowing body of the serpent as their archetype. To induce visual perception of the form of a serpent, a simple two-dimensional waveform constitutes the minimum threshold, and this is why jade works of the Warring States Period typically employed a flat two-dimensional waveform design to represent the serpent body. With this in mind, it becomes clear why this work takes the form of a flat silhouette, with a winding, wave-shaped body. The rise and fall of the waveform is shown to create an undulating sense of movement, an excellent way of generating illusory motion, and this advantage subsequently contributed to the widespread use of this technique.
caption: 展櫃內展出蛇身波形玉飾，搭配二維平面蛇身設計原則展板
notes: 牆面說明板＋展櫃，玻璃反光

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
蜿蜒身形
A sinuous body
為什麼是蛇身？
Why is this seen as a serpent body?
會認為此件玉器具有蛇形身軀的原因相當明確，大腦自然會將具有波形特徵的玉器辨識為蛇的蜿蜒身形。
We perceive this piece of jade as having the shape of a snake, for reasons that are clear. The brain will naturally perceive this waveform as being the sinuous form of a snake.
具有蛇身的龍
A dragon with a serpent body
本對玉器也具有蜿蜒的形體，所以不論是左圖玉器的側邊多增加了諸多分歧勾轉的造形單元；還是右圖玉器更進一步加琢了紋飾，視覺都會將兩者辨識為蛇身。此外，本對玉器又設計了龍首的鼻、吻、頭角，由於符合大腦對於龍母題的認知印象，具有蛇身的神龍也就條忽現形。
This pair of jade works also have sinuous forms, so despite the additions of branched elements to the jade work at top left or the addition of decorative patterns to the jade work at top right, both these jade works will be perceived as depicting serpents. In addition, this pair of jade works include designs that resemble the dragon nose, snout, and horns, and this triggers the memory of the dragon theme in the brain. Consequently, these works are perceived as depicting divine dragons with sinuous serpent bodies.
caption: 蛇身辨識原理圖解，含蜿蜒身形示意玉器圖

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
蛇、獸不同程度的簡化圖像以及最低限度圖像
Varying degrees of simplification and minimum threshold images for the serpent and the beast
簡化本即創作的形式之一，若試圖讓觀看者瞭解簡化內容為何，自然要避免簡化過甚，倘若低於視覺所能辨識的最低標準，即失去創作意義。
戰國和漢代玉器的設計原型各為蛇和獸，由本則蛇、獸的簡化過程可知，蜿蜒波形是視覺辨識蛇的最低限度圖像，而分明清晰的獸足則是辨識獸的最低限度圖像。故而只要將獸足置放於剪影之中，雖然視覺仍無法判斷剪影究竟是何種動物，但無疑已可辨識出必然是某種獸類。
既然蜿蜒的波形和分明清晰的獸足分別是視覺辨識出蛇與獸的最低限度圖像，可知亦是戰國至漢代玉器設計的簡化極限，實為最基本的創作形式。
Simplification is a creative technique, but in order to let viewers understand what the simplified designs represent, over-simplification must be avoided, since if the minimum discernible threshold is not reached, the creative meaning will be lost.
The design archetypes of the Warring States Period and Han Dynasty were respectively the serpent and the beast, and from the simplification process of these archetypes, it can be seen that the sinuous waveform is the minimum threshold image for the serpent, while the beast limb is the minimum threshold image for the beast. Therefore, simply placing a beast limb in a silhouette induces visual perception to interpret the shape as some kind of beast, even though the silhouette cannot be identified as belonging to a specific animal.
Since the sinuous waveform and the beast limb respectively serve as the minimum threshold for discerning serpents and beasts, these also constitute the limit of simplification for Warring States Period and Han Dynasty jade designs, and represent the basic creative forms of the time.
蛇、獸照片 Photos of snake and beast
初步簡化 Preliminary simplification
進一步簡化 Further simplification
最低限度圖像 Minimum threshold image
無法辨識 Indiscernible
caption: 蛇與獸簡化圖像最低限度原理大圖，含蛇與獸剪影漸變示意
notes: 牆面大型原理圖，IMG_4653 為同板特寫

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
如何應用橫長矩形具有的視覺張力
How the visual tension of horizontal rectangles can be utilized
本件玉劍璲上的神獸，因應矩形輪廓，略加延長頭頸以及身軀，兩前足則縮小比例伏貼於身軀，如此保持了完整而流暢的蜿蜒波形。另藉由神獸頭頸和後足的回轉形式，將矩形向左右發散的張力回導內壓，從而形成強烈的力量感知。
To better conform with the rectangular outline of this jade scabbard slide, the divine beast in this work has a slightly extended neck and body, and the forelimbs have been shortened and placed closely against the body. This allows a complete and smooth sinuous waveform to be maintained, while the reversed orientation of the head, neck, and hindlimbs draws the natural visual tension projecting outward to the left and right back into the work, thereby creating a strong sense of visual strength.
caption: 橫長矩形視覺張力應用原理板，含玉劍璲示意圖與箭頭張力圖

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
如何應用傾斜的視覺力量
How the visual strength of the tilt can be utilized
兩獸蜿蜒身形依全器圓形輪廓略加調整，由此兩獸身形主軸傾斜，形成視覺效果；加上身足各處因桯具和管具精緻去料所形成的圓凹，蘊藏圓形外擴張力，匯聚成此件動感十足的作品。
The sinuous body shape of the two beasts was slightly adjusted to conform with the round outline of this work, and the main axes of the two bodies are tilted to form the visual effect. In addition, the round indentations formed around the body and legs by ting bores and pipe tools generate the circular outward expanding tension, and these forces combine to create the powerful sensation of movement seen in this work.
玉龍身軀呈蜿蜒波形
The sinuous bodies of the two beasts and the tilted axes
caption: 傾斜視覺力量應用原理板，含圓形玉龍身軀傾斜軸線示意圖

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
畫蛇添足—戰國玉器創造動態錯覺的根本技巧
EAdding feet to a snake—A fundamental technique for creating illusory motion in Warring States jades
本件玉龍蜿蜒身軀的上下各有一對相同的造形單元，因為位置適切，大腦會辨識為特徵不顯的兩對雙足；由於上下兩對足的方向各自不同，當相同的頭部和身軀搭配不同方向的雙足，就如同兩張各述去其中一對雙足的解析照片，大腦會認為其一為匍匐在地、回顧身後的靜態神龍；另一為蜿蜒蓄勢、準備跳躍的動態神龍。當合併在同一件玉龍時，視覺會在一靜一動、一張一弛之中來回辨識，注意力輪替轉換過程中產生似動現象，從而產生連續動態錯覺。
On the top and bottom sides of the jade dragon shown here, pairs of identical design elements have been respectively placed. As these elements have been placed at appropriate positions, the brain identifies them as representing legs. Since the top and bottom pair of legs point in different directions, when the head and body are respectively aligned with different pairs of legs, the brain will interpret one alignment as depicting a recumbent divine dragon, with its head turned to look backward; while the other alignment will be viewed as a tense divine dragon getting ready to spring. When these two alignments are combined in the same jade dragon, our sense of vision will shift between the static versus dynamic and the tense versus relaxed alignments, thereby generating continuous illusory motion.
相同的造形單元置放於適切的位置時，大腦會辨識為特徵不顯的足部
When the same pair of components are placed at appropriate positions, the brain will identify them as inconspicuous feet.
caption: 畫蛇添足原理板，含玉龍雙足造形單元辨識示意圖
notes: 原理說明板，IMG_4659 為下半段續文

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
turned to look backward; while the other alignment will be viewed as a tense divine dragon getting ready to spring. When these two alignments are combined in the same jade dragon, our sense of vision will shift between the static versus dynamic and the tense versus relaxed alignments, thereby generating continuous illusory motion.
相同的造形單元置放於適切的位置時，大腦會辨識為特徵不顯的足部
When the same pair of components are placed at appropriate positions, the brain will identify them as inconspicuous feet.
（左圖）視覺忽視上方雙足時，大腦會感知出神龍為靜止回顧的形體
（右圖）視覺忽視下方雙足時，大腦會感知出神龍為蜿蜒蓄勢、準備跳躍的形體
(Left) When visually ignoring the feet on the top, the brain will perceive the image as a dragon lying still with its head turning back.
(Right) When visually ignoring the feet on the bottom, the brain will perceive the image as a dragon gaining momentum and ready for a leap.
caption: 畫蛇添足原理板下半段，含玉龍靜態/動態雙視角對照圖

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
歧出的造形單元即使因故斷裂，也不會影響視覺辨識視蜿蜒主體
Even if the branched design elements are broken off, visual discernment of the main sinuous waveform is not affected
增加不具特徵且規範化的造形單元，並不會影響視覺辨識波形主體；反過來說，減少此類造形單元。波形主體也依然流暢起伏。例如此處成對玉龍，雖然上方玉龍的頭首左端略殘，但也不足以影響身形主體，視覺仍會認為上下玉龍雖然略有差異，但依然具有相同完整的蜿蜒蛇身。
Adding standardized design elements lacking in special features will not affect visual discernment of the main waveform. Conversely, the main waveform retains its smooth undulation even in the absence of these branched design elements. For example, in the pair of jade dragons shown here, the left part of the head of the top dragon is slightly damaged, but this does not affect perception of the main body. Our sense of vision will notice this difference between the top and bottom dragons, but will perceive the sinuous serpent bodies of both dragons as being completely whole.
購玉000800
購玉000801
caption: 歧出造形斷裂不影響辨識原理板，含成對玉龍圖（編號購玉000800、000801）

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
視覺中斷法—視覺連續性的應用
Visual occlusion—an application of visual continuity
一般人觀看此圖時，會辨識為一橫長面積遮蔽在波形上，亦即波形是連續完整的，而不會認為是由五段短弧線和一橫長面積共同組成。
When people view this picture, they recognize it as a transverse bar covering the waveform; that is, the waveform is continuous and complete. They do not think it is composed of five short arcs and a transverse bar.
基於視覺連續性原理，分歧並不會影響視覺辨識出波形主體。即使波形被長直面積截而過，視覺也會自動接續被遮蔽的線段，大腦仍然會認為圖案是由主要的連續波形和遮蔽其上的長直面積組合而成，而不會認為是由長直面積以及五段弧線組成。
對視覺而言，西漢扭轉獸身不甚協調，所以玉器設計者發明了「視覺中斷法」，想方設法遮蔽扭轉蜿蜒的獸身中段，由於視覺被短暫中斷、緩和了扭轉龍身的不協調，而又因「視覺連續性」原理，大腦仍會自動將前後兩段身軀連接成完整的形體。這種看似簡單、難以察覺的技巧，實則出神入化、去蕪存菁，堪稱偉大的藝術發明。
Due to the principle of visual continuity, extended branches do not impact visual perception of the main waveform. Even if waveforms are disrupted by a transverse bar, our visual senses will still perceive the image as being composed of the main contin...
caption: 視覺中斷法原理板，含波形被橫長面積遮蔽的連續性示意圖

gallery_guess: 玉器特展—蛇身設計原理區
ocr_text:
視覺連續性原理
The principle of visual continuity
格式塔心理學（完形心理學）有幾個重要的基本原理，其中之一是本則簡單介紹的「視覺連續性原理」。
觀察上方第一張圖解，一般人不會辨識成第二張圖解，不會認為第一張圖是由四段不同的獨立單元左右接續而成；而會辨識為最下方的圖解，認為圖的主體就是連續蜿蜒的波形。而波形中依次出現的歧出弧線並不會干擾視覺辨識蜿蜒主體。此種視覺特性即為視覺連續性原理。
There are several important basic principles in Gestalt psychology (gestaltism), one of which is the principle of visual continuity that will be briefly explained here.
Upon observing the topmost image, most people will not interpret it as the configuration shown in the middle image, or consider it to be composed of four independent components linked together. Rather, the topmost image will be discerned as shown in the bottom image, in which the primary feature is considered to be the sinuous waveform, and the short branched elements...
caption: 視覺連續性原理（格式塔心理學）說明板，含三層波形分解示意圖
